# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We apply security patches to the latest major version of the package. Please ensure you are running a supported version before reporting an issue.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| >= 0.1.x| :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1.x | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do **not** report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please report it privately via email to: **andre@andrefellipe.com**.

### What to include in your report:
* A description of the vulnerability and its impact.
* Detailed steps to reproduce the issue.
* Any relevant environment details (Python version, operating system, etc.).
* A proposed mitigation or patch, if you have one.

### Response Timeline
You should receive an acknowledgment of your report within 48 hours. If the vulnerability is confirmed, we will work with you to patch the issue and publish a security advisory. We will credit you for the discovery in the release notes unless you prefer to remain anonymous.
